title: Duplicate CTE name gives incorrect result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0));
CREATE VIEW v2 AS SELECT Name FROM (VALUES ('A'), ('B')) AS t4(Name);
CREATE VIEW v3 AS SELECT D.id, P.name, T.Att, T.Val, T.Act FROM t1 D CROSS JOIN v2 P CROSS JOIN (VALUES ('C', 'D', 'E'), ('F', 'G', 'H')) AS t4(Att, Val, Act);
key_bug_features: Duplicate CTE names in joined views cause incorrect results
